feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: You were the one to teach me how to use knives: Vol 5
entry.summary:
Author: Obsessedwithfanfiction

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,472Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 52

Summary: Morgana's memory curse is still in place, but Leon's no longer the only person suspicious of her. Gwen's got a mystery to solve and a long-lost brother to deal with. Morgana's determined to get closer to Merlin again to try and find out how long he's been hiding his magic from her. Meanwhile Merlin's just flattered to be receiving a Lady's attention, though with Gwaine coming back into his life, that might not be the only attention he's receiving. And Arthur's struggling his way back through his character growth and what kind of King he wants to be...

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Lancelot & Merlin (Merlin)
  • Gwen/Lancelot (Merlin)
  • Gwen & Lancelot (Merlin)
  • Elyan & Lancelot (Merlin)

  • Geraint (Merlin)
  • Morgause (Merlin)
  • Gaius (Merlin)
  • Uther Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Percival (Merlin)
  • Daegal (Merlin)
  • George (Merlin)
  • Geoffrey of Monmouth (Merlin)
  • I am finally BACK baby!!!
  • In NZ
  • living my best life
  • Do I have a solid internet connection?
  • no!
  • Do I have a job?
  • Nope!
  • Have I finally relaxed maybe a single inch?
  • MAYBE!
  • Am I still obsessed with this ridiculous show and how much they all love each other in new and tragic ways?
  • Hell yes!
  • Fix-It
  • Series 2 onwards rewrite
  • Pls read the other parts first or this will make no sense
  • What if BBC's Merlin had emotional catharsis?
  • And consistency?
  • And a head writer who cared more about all these characters having long conversations with each other
  • Than actually advancing the plot
  • Ofc everyone is still in love with Merlin
  • And also Gwen
  • Guys I hate to jinx it but I think this is finally the part where the title should make sense
  • don't quote me though
  • No beta we die like Uther should have done seasons before he did
  • did ya miss me
  • I am going to try and update every 3 weeks ish on a Friday but it will be dependent on internet connection
  • Everyone go support your local libraries
  • They're where I'm writing in now

entry.title: ̶I̶ ̶L̶o̶v̶e̶ ̶Y̶o̶u̶ I Hate You!
entry.summary:
Author: Larluce

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 86,301Chapters: 12/13Kudos: 184

Summary: Safe. He is safe. The phantom pain recedes, replaced by the solidity of her arms, the softness of her gown. The cruel, laughing faces of his friends are gone and Morgana is here. She came for him. She saved him. He is not alone anymore. OR Morgana takes Merlin instead of Gwen to the Dark Tower.   Mostly a transcription of my tumblr posts. Written in a mix of novel and script format. Beta Yess_Ulloa ❤️

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: A straight approach to being queer
entry.summary:
Author: SueRose

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 109,345Chapters: 27/?Kudos: 93

Summary: Rich nepo boy Arthur Pendragon joins his university's queer club. And pretends to be queer, because he needs to write a paper about queer representation. But.... He has not expected this. This being the leader of the club, namely Merlins Emrys, who does not believe a word he says. Will he be able to appear queer enough to his new peers? Or will all of this end up in a giant disaster?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: how to become a warlock of legend
entry.summary:
Author: sleepygecko

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,636Chapters: 27/29Kudos: 113

Summary: The greatest warlock of all time may have lived in the Middle Ages, but he was not born into them. Rather, he was born in 1995. It was theorized that the reason for this was so he could benefit from a full modern education before stepping back in time to complete his destiny.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: That Funny Feeling
entry.summary:
Author: TwistedWizard345

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,838Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 7

Summary: When two nobles arrive in Camelot, everything seems normal. However, Merlin quickly finds out they are not who they say they are and assumes they have come to assassinate the king (or his prince). Can he and Arthur stop them before they accomplish their true goal? More importantly, can they stay in one piece long enough to do so?

entry.title: The Absolution of the Son
entry.summary:
Author: LadyWhistleClown

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,358Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 71

Summary: Arthur is angry when he learns that he is born of magic and that his Father sacrificed his Mother so he could have an heir. In this version of events, Merlin doesn't tell Arthur that Morgause lied to him. Arthur must confront his Father and face Camelot's history of discriminatory anti-magic policies head on, including his own role in them. All while he feels himself slowly drawn closer and closer to his manservant Merlin. Meanwhile, Merlin must continue to keep his magic secret and work in the shadows for the better future with Arthur he's been promised is his destiny.

entry.summary:

entry.title: Lost to All But Time
entry.summary:
Author: a_written_simulacra

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,141Chapters: 3/5Kudos: 35

Summary: Merlin has waited beside the lake for over 1,500 years, and when he finally gets a visitor, it's not Arthur Pendragon--but an eccentric English man who arrives in a blue telephone box, calls himself the Doctor, and claims that not only is time travel real, but it's absolutely imperative that Merlin go back in time with him--back to the age of Camelot where Prince Arthur is very much alive.

entry.title: Beneath The Same Sky: A Love Is Revealed
entry.summary:
Author: Its_Ivory

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,812Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 5

Summary: Two young men. Two sides of the same coin. Two destinies intertwined, inseparable from each other, yet they couldn't be more different. Merlin, the personal servant and, coincidentally, arguably the most powerful magician of his time and the one to come. And Arthur, the future king of Camalot and perhaps the only person who has unconsciously made it his life's mission to make Merlin's life a living hell and the worst part is, he does it with a smile. And yet, Arthur is blind to Merlin's magic, for Merlin uses it quite frequently in the young prince's presence. Their paths crossed not too long ago, and since then they've been more or less on the same track. Merlin ensures every day that Arthur's royal backside doesn't meet its demise, while Arthur remains oblivious, believing himself untouchable. So be it... for now.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: When Magic meets the modern day, chaos ensues
entry.summary:
Author: Music_girl2024

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,281Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 17

Summary: Merlin shouldn’t have turned himself into a tree…1500 years ago it seemed like a smart idea - wait out the years until Arthur’s return as part of nature, without having to interact with anyone. He wasn’t expecting the lake to expand and for his tree to end up in the shallows. Nor was he expecting to be spat out randomly on what he assumed to be an ordinary sunset. Now he’s stuck in the middle of a lake, a recently resurrected Arthur Pendragon in his arms and someone is staring at them.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: 500 Miles From My Home
entry.summary:
Author: alesha_333

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,572Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 53

Summary: Merlin counts the miles at first. Ten, because he is still able to turn back.Fifty because it finally feels like leaving. He tells himself he will stop. He’ll go back. He doesn’t.The words echo in his mind, the blue in Arthur’s eyes dimming, the flinch at the word traitor. A hundred miles from Camelot, that’s all he needs, right?

entry.summary:
Author: tummyclub

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,880Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 39

entry.title: Golden Hair/Golden Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: wryterwolf

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 100,584Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 191

Summary: A rewriting of the series where Arthur discovers Merlin's magic way earlier. It will follow the series where it can and diverge as needed, with some fun little scenes inspired by Tumblr posts.This begins in the aftermath of the battle for Ealdor. Also don’t forget to check out part 2 of the series. It has additional backstory and plot.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 102,375Chapters: 67/?Kudos: 34

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.

  • Major Character Death
  • Gwen/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)

entry.title: Maybe, One Day
entry.summary:
Author: sensei_no_petu

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,857Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 21

Summary: Arthur is a prince. Merlin is a servant. It seems simple enough. But is it really?One morning, Arthur cannot find Merlin and later discovers something personal about him, which makes him question the true nature of their relationship.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
